items.name: vibe-fishing
items.description: Vibe Fishing 是一个面向“可观测多代理协作”的对话式开发环境：后端负责多代理编排、技能系统、工具调用与线程/产物存储；前端负责流式渲染、Agent 轨迹与工具时间线展示，以及产物预览。

items.name: cf-gitlab
items.description: 12 Cloudflare products, zero inbound ports. Storage never fills up (R2). Certs never expire (DNS-01). Login is gated by identity, not passwords (Access). Public downloads are cached at the edge (Workers). Backups go offsite automatically (R2). SSH works from anywhere (Tunnel). One .env file configures everything.

items.name: claude-afk
items.description: Let Claude work while you play with the cats. Approve or reject Claude Code commands from your Apple Watch, iPhone, or Android — from anywhere, with a single tap.
